name: Republic Day (Turkey)
traditions: Torchlit youth processions; military flyovers; fireworks; flag decorations; civic ceremonies; concerts.
historicalBackground: Republic Day marks October 29, 1923, when Mustafa Kemal Atatürk proclaimed the Republic of Turkey, ending the Ottoman Empire.
description: Turkey's celebration of the founding of the Republic, with torchlit processions and fireworks honoring Atatürk's legacy.
